name: Abdullah Saeed Khodari
title: Frontend Engineer
summary: Passionate and detail-oriented Frontend Engineer specializing in building highly responsive, scalable, and accessible web and mobile applications. Expert in React.js, Next.js, and React Native (Expo) with a strong foundation in modern styling frameworks like Tailwind CSS. Adept at translating complex Figma designs into pixel-perfect UIs and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver seamless user experiences.

bullets: Architected and maintained scalable full-stack web applications using React.js, Tailwind CSS, and Node.js.
Designed and optimized relational database schemas in MySQL and PostgreSQL (via Supabase) using Drizzle ORM for high-performance data storage.
Integrated multi-provider payment systems (Stripe, Fawry) and SMS services, ensuring secure and reliable transaction processing.
Engineered a robust push notification infrastructure for Android (Firebase FCM) and iOS (APNs) to drive user engagement.
Implemented AI-powered features by integrating OpenAI API, enhancing application intelligence and automation capabilities.
Developed the frontend for a home service booking mobile application using React Native (Expo) and Tailwind CSS.
Translated Figma designs into high-quality, pixel-perfect, and responsive UI components across various screen sizes.
Integrated service booking flows, user profiles, and real-time status updates through RESTful API consumption.
Spearheaded the frontend development of a game-based learning web platform using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
Built and published a cross-platform mobile application using React Native (Expo), deployed to Google Play and Apple App Store.
Implemented complex client-side integrations including Apple In-App Purchases, Tap payments, and Tabby split payments.
Managed static asset delivery and optimization via AWS S3 to ensure fast load times and a smooth user experience.

projects.name: Trego eCommerce Platform
bullets: Engineered a modern, fully-featured eCommerce web application built with Next.js, TypeScript, shadcn, and lucide.
Developed a bilingual interface (Arabic and English) ensuring full RTL/LTR responsiveness across all devices.
Created an intuitive frontend architecture for product listings, multilingual search, smart shopping carts, and a comprehensive admin dashboard.

projects.name: QR Generator Authentication Mobile App
bullets: Developed a cross-platform mobile app using React Native and Expo for secure QR code generation and management.
Implemented strict client-side input validation using the Zod schema validation library.
Integrated real-time Socket.io connections for dynamic UI updates upon authentication state changes.

projects.name: Game-Based Learning Mobile App
bullets: Designed and built the user interface for a children's game-based learning app using React Native (Expo).
Created dynamic game views and an interactive level map populated by data fetched from backend APIs.

projects.name: RentEase Web Interface
bullets: Built a responsive React interface for property listing and booking, optimized for seamless user navigation.
Integrated automated WhatsApp messaging triggers directly from the frontend UI.

education.details: Intensive hands-on training focusing on building full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Angular, and Node.js.

education.degree: Bachelor's in Computer and Systems Engineering
education.details: Grade: Very good. Graduation project: Game-based learning mobile app (Grade: Excellent).
